name: Benzophenone
description: Benzophenone is the organic compound. Substituted benzophenones such as oxybenzone and dioxybenzone are used in sunscreen.

interactions.name: Porfimer sodium
interactions.description: Benzophenone may increase the photosensitizing activities of Porfimer sodium.

interactions.name: Verteporfin
interactions.description: Benzophenone may increase the photosensitizing activities of Verteporfin.
